title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Pilgrim

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Pilgrim
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Pilgrim! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Pilgrim:
Pilgrim is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pilgrim!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
